title: gymnanthemum malabaricum
intro: Gymnanthemum malabaricum, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a type of herbaceous plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum malabaricum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
